runTitle: Vercel production release-gate QA after trend warning rules
coveredSurfaces: dashboard summary counts (전체 15 / 온라인 14 / 경고 1 / 위험 0 / 오프라인 0)
server detail 3-tab switch (종합 상황 / 성능 분석 / 로그 & 네트워크)
AI starter prompt send + streaming response
AI response parity (14 normal, 1 warning, avg CPU 32 / MEM 48 / DISK 32, cache-redis-dc1-01 MEM 83%)

expertAssessments.rationale: Dashboard slot data and AI streaming response were checked in the same production session and remained numerically aligned.
Production alias, deployment evidence, smoke endpoints, and Vercel usage were all validated without release-blocking drift.
Playwright MCP evidence covered release-gate core routes, dashboard modal behavior, and AI parity checks with reusable artifacts.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after release-gate QA; effective 1.9605 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected usage spike.

artifacts.label: Dashboard AI parity
artifacts.note: Dashboard summary and AI response parity evidence

artifacts.label: 404 console log
artifacts.note: Expected 404 resource error only on intentional not-found route

notes: Vercel production release-gate run against deployment dpl_2MuHQZg4ePQmikAr8MYk5rkWj1ic (commit 7095e76834d0a20e9e35640e753dfa731a6a5e7f).
AI timing observability passed via X-AI-Latency-Ms=205 while Server-Timing and X-AI-Processing-Ms were absent, which matches the documented production SSOT.
404 console error was confined to the intentional /this-route-should-404 probe and is treated as expected evidence, not a product regression.
